Description_preview: to the overview of CK Presents: Richard Cunha - Immigrant Friend Nov 6 Friday CK Presents: Richard Cunha - Immigrant Friend Credits: Richard Cunha Buy tickets Fri, 6. November 2026 Doors open at: 19:00 20:00 - 22:00 ComedyHaus, Zürich (CH) share Share now Just 3 years ago Richard Cunha was doing his first open mic with Comedy Kiss, now we proudly present his first solo show ever! The first dates sold out within a week, so here we are with a further date for you. Here's what he has to say about this show: "This show is about figuring out how to make real connections, regardless of how good your passport is. Around 3 years ago, I quit my job to follow my dream of making people laugh. Swiss immigration didn’t like that, but my Swiss friends did! With the support of wonderful immigrant-loving people, I finally made it. This is my first solo , and it is an homage to kindness, frienship and my permit B. There will be plenty of jokes and real, yet unbelievable, stories. See you there, friend." ----- FAQ and More Info: Q: What time should I arrive? A: Doors open at 19:00. Arrive early to grab a drink and secure the best seats. Q: What language is the show? A: The show is in English. Q: What kind of comedy will I see? Will it be offensive? A: We can't guarantee you won't be offended since this is very relative. In the show description, you’ll find links to help you decide if that comedian is right for you. Ultimately, our goal is to bring good times and laughter to Switzerland and not to hurt feelings. Description_preview: Apr 23 Thursday Milan Milanski - Schwugo Credits: Milan Milanski Buy tickets Thu, 23. April 2026 20:00 - 22:00 Caverno Bülach, Bülach (CH) share Share now Was wie eine Beleidigung klingt, ist in Milanskis Welt eher die Erfindung eines Superhelden. In seinem ersten abendfüllenden Programm geht es eben genau um diese Reise: Vom Coming Out zu Coming of Age, von Plattenbau und Arbeiterklasse zu RTL2 und Britney Spears. Seine Comedy ist lustig, ein bisschen loco und in erster Linie verdammt ehrlich. Milan nimmt uns mit auf eine Achterbahnfahrt durch sein bisheriges Leben und scheut sich nicht, auch die schrägsten und (je nach Gusto) peinlichsten Momente zu teilen. Milan Milanski ist seit Jahren in aller Munde und damit ist jetzt nicht „das“ gemeint. Sei es als Moderator des erfolgreichsten Open Mics der Schweiz oder als Außenreporter von Stefan Büssers „Late Nite Switzerland“ - der Schwugo liefert und gehört zu den jungen Wilden der hiesigen Comedyszene. Mit seinem unnachahmlichen Stil und seiner scharfen Zunge trifft er den Nerv der Generation Y und denen die da gerne dazugehören wollen. Also Karten kaufen und den inneren Schwugo heraufbeschwören! Milan Milanski Unser Restaurant ist vor der Vorstellung für euch geöffnet, geniesst ein gemütliches Essen, bevor die Show beginnt! Reservation erwünscht. Description_preview: Apr 30 Thursday Schrödinger's Mic: English stand-up comedy Credits: SaraB Buy tickets Thu, 30. April 2026 Doors open at: 19:00 20:00 - 22:00 CAB StuZ (ETH Building), Zürich (CH) share Share now Are you the one who always sends memes? The loudest laugh in the group chat? The friend who says “just one drink” and somehow stays out all night? Then this comedy show is for you. Join us for Schrödinger’s Mic , a night of English stand-up comedy brought to you by ESN Zürich and ESN Winterthur . Expect a lineup of some of the best comedians on the Swiss comedy scene, delivering sharp jokes, chaotic stories, and the kind of humour that keeps you laughing long after the show is over. Whether you come with friends, a date, your flatmates, or just by yourself, this is the perfect excuse to grab a drink, relax, and enjoy a great night out. Don’t miss out – see you there, fam! We’re also excited to welcome a lineup of standout comedians from the Swiss comedy scene. The night will be hosted by headliner Richard Cunha , with performances from Matteo Hermann , Martina Hulme , Łukasz Segiet , Val Ann , and Pouya ! A few things to know before the show: The performance will be in English Doors open at 19:00 , and the show begins at 20:00 Drinks will be available before the show and during the intermission Photos will be taken during the event for promotional purposes, and possibly for someone’s Hinge profile. Description_preview: Oct 10 Saturday The Big Comedy Kiss with Anuvab Pal Credits: Shane Norton Buy tickets Sat, 10. October 2026 Doors open at: 18:30 19:30 - 21:30 SOHO, Zürich (CH) share Share now Our much-loved comedy night is back — and this time, we’re turning up the spotlight! We’ve gone all out to make this our most exciting edition yet, featuring one incredible international star alongside some of the finest local comedians in Switzerland. Anuvab Pal – Described by The New York Times as “India’s most intelligent comedian” and by the BBC as “India’s answer to British wit,” Anuvab Pal is one of the most globally recognised English-speaking comics to come out of India. His stand-up special The Nation Wants To Know has played over 500 sold-out shows from Mumbai to Sydney to San Francisco, while his hit show Empire — a comedy about the history of the British Empire in India — has toured internationally across 12 cities and is now available as a special on Amazon Prime UK as part of Soho Theatre Live. Beyond stand-up, Anuvab is a prolific writer and creator. He has written Bollywood films Loins of Punjab Presents and The President Is Coming , the latter developed by London’s Royal Court Theatre . His play Chaos Theory became a bestselling novel, and he has created multiple sitcoms for Amazon Prime Video India.
